scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: Stanford says every component of the application is valuable and that there is no score guaranteeing admission; the cited pages do not state a simple minimum course-rigor formula.
areas.detail: Stanford says every component of the application is valuable and that there is no score guaranteeing admission; the cited pages do not state a simple minimum course-rigor formula.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Stanford requires a school report form and counselor letter of recommendation plus letters of recommendation from two teachers.
areas.detail: Stanford requires a school report form and counselor letter of recommendation plus letters of recommendation from two teachers.
